name: Miraculous Ladybug RP: Create/Generate Scenarios
description:
(Proxy highly reccomended)

Miraculous Ladybug RP: Make your own scenario/Bot Generated Scenarios

I updated the bot to include character information again. It doesn’t have mentions of Hawkmoth or Chrysalis, so you can start in either arc. Same thing with the heroes, doesn’t say what miraculous they have. Might include superheroes and villains names in the script in the future though.

Characters are aged 18+

Confession: I haven't actually watched the show I just watched an essay about some of the characters and I got hook. A lot of shorts/reels give me pieces that I put together in the show. Not the first time this happened.
creator: TheAnxiousCreature
